text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The rush I felt back then still lingers within me. That's why I run—to
feel that rush once more.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
A dream all my own... Something I thought about day and night. I
really think that drive to win is what helped me train as hard as I did.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: How do I even... find my own dream?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: What do we have here? The Spe, slacking off in a place like this?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sei?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Aw maaan, I'm not getting any bites today.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh well, fishing is really just a battle of patience. And no way I would let myself lose to a fish.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...You know, I really want to give a race performance that leaves
everyone speechless.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I've never been... a runner people write home about. Ever since I was
a kid, my race results were only so-so.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But that didn't stop me from wanting to win.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So that got me thinking, how can a runner like me pull it off? I thought and thought, and eventually, I figured it out.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I came up with my strategy and everything fell into place! The underdog Sei wins! You should've seen it. The shocked faces of the crowd and the fan fav were priceless!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Maaan, did that feel good. I never knew racing could make me feel something like that.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Guess you could call it a formative experience. But that's what sealed
it for me. My reason for running is leaving people gobsmacked.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: That's why I'll do whatever it takes to win. No trick is off-limits...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sei...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I bet you've experienced something like that yourself. Something that
made your heart soar.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Now that you mention it...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh! And, and! You look so glamorous when you're runn'n! Like, sooo pretty!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
If I hadn't seen you run with a big smile on your face, I would never
have had the courage to chase my dreams!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I remember thinking... I want to run like Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'd just moved here and was seeing an Umamusume run for the very
first time. She was just so fast—and so beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to be just like her—run just like her! So I set off, determined
to catch up!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm still far from reaching her level, but... I know I'll reach Suzuka
someday!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I see, I see... So you wanna be like Suzuka, huh? That is ambitious.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But it's perfect for you. So that's your reason for running, huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: My reason for running...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah... That's my reason! That's... my dream!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And just so we're clear, the dream you inherited from your moms is
just as much your dream as theirs.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Heck, I'd say we're pretty similar in that way. I've got two dreams
too—one from my gramps and one that's all me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I guess having two whole dreams is what got me so worked up in the
Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So those two dreams—and the drive to make them both come
true—are what helped you fight until the very end.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That's just how badly you wanted the win.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Still, I sure hope helping you today doesn't come back to bite me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Now that you and I know what our dreams are, I bet the Derby's
gonna be real tricky.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah, no way am I losing this time!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I mean, I've got three dreams on my side.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Mine, my mama's, and my mom's!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: So I'm definitely winning the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh? Well, aren't you confident.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
In that case, my help ends here! From now on, you'll have to rely on
your trainer. Who, by the way, seems pretty worried.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Can't help my rival out too much now, can I?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Sei!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Traaainer!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Okay, okay! I'm opening up!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Let's get training for the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Another year has passed, and we're here at last! Welcome to the
Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Just who among the Golden Generation will snatch this most
honorable of crowns?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's it, just breathe... Watch out for that first corner, and stick to
your own pacing...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Mm-hm! Now just remember where you are—the Derby! The DEEERBYYYY! Be sure to take it all in!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You know this already, but this is your one and only chance to win the
title of Derby Umamusume, so you have to throw your WHOLE
HEART into it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: My whole heart... Got it!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Have some confidence. You've put in the work. Now all that's left to
do is win.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Have some confidence. You've put in the work. Now all that's left to
do is win.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um... I really want to thank you all. If you hadn't helped me with my
training, I wouldn't be where I am today!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
There was a moment where I thought I was missing something you all
had... But then someone reminded me just how special my dreams are!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
If I'm going to become the best racer in Japan for my moms and catch
up to my favorite racer in the whole world, I gotta give today my all!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: We'll be right there, watching over you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Right! Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Now that's the fiery Spe I know.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yup, I'm here to win, and that's that!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The same goes for me... I don't think I've ever wanted to win more.
This is the one and only Derby, after all.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Guess that's what happens when you've got dreams. You can't help
but be motivated.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: As your rival... I hope you're going to give me a challenge.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: The feeling is mutual. No holding back!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Eighteen of the best classic-year racers are now entering the gates!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Before them lies 2,400 meters of track, and for one of them, glory!
The Japanese Derby... begins now!
